'''Malindin Gevarak''' was a small-time counterfeiter from [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]] who was wanted by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] for forging [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|Imperial credits]] for use by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] personnel. Gevarak traveled with the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]], [[Cherioer]]. Last seen in the [[Baronos sector/Legends|Baronos sector]], Gevarak's [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] eventually reached 10,000 credits for live capture. He was recognizable by several facial piercings and [[Tattoo/Legends|tattoos]].
